Tests for the "NaN" property of the Number object, including recognition, enumeration, and immutability.


## Files
- **[15.07.03.04-001.js](15.07.03.04-001.js.md)**: Tests if the Number object has the "NaN" property.
- **[15.07.03.04-002.js](15.07.03.04-002.js.md)**: Tests if `Number.NaN` is recognized as `NaN` using an assertion.
- **[15.07.03.04-003.js](15.07.03.04-003.js.md)**: Tests that the "NaN" property is not enumerable in the Number object.
- **[15.07.03.04-004.js](15.07.03.04-004.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of `Number.NaN` by attempting to assign it a value and checking with `isNaN`.
- **[15.07.03.04-005.js](15.07.03.04-005.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of the Number.NaN property by attempting to delete it.
